headline: AEROFARMS ACQUIRED BY AN AFFILIATE OF PALM VENTURES, POSITIONS U.S. MICROGREENS LEADER FOR EXPANDED DISTRIBUTION AND LONG-TERM GROWTH
summary: AeroFarms, an indoor vertical farming company and the leading U.S. supplier of fresh microgreens, today announced its acquisition by an affiliate of Palm Ventures, an Austin and Greenwich-based family investment office with a 30-year track record of successfully building profitable, durable, mission-driven businesses. The transaction was completed in April 2026. Under the new ownership, Gustavo Burger, whose prior experience includes leadership roles at Kraft Heinz and Anheuser-Busch InBev, now

headline: Molinos Río de la Plata to buy NotCo units in Argentina, Uruguay
summary: Molinos Río de la Plata said the deal gives the company “innovation credentials based on trends associated with a new generation of consumers”.
